# Isaac Vazquez

> Product manager and UC Berkeley Haas MBA Candidate with 6+ years across SaaS, analytics, civic tech, and QA-to-product work. Builds AI workflow, fintech, sports-data, and decision-support products.

Last reviewed: 2026-07-20

## About

Isaac Vazquez is a product manager and UC Berkeley Haas MBA Candidate, Class of 2027. His background spans product strategy, quality engineering, data analytics, civic technology, fintech-style tooling, and AI workflow products. He is a Consortium Fellow and MLT Professional Development Fellow.

- Website: https://isaacavazquez.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/isaac-vazquez/
- GitHub: https://github.com/IsaacAVazquez
- Email: IsaacVazquez@berkeley.edu
- Full public sitemap: https://isaacavazquez.com/sitemap.xml
- RSS feed: https://isaacavazquez.com/api/rss

## Retrieval Hints

- Canonical project route: https://isaacavazquez.com/portfolio
- Canonical writing route: https://isaacavazquez.com/writing
- Legacy `/projects`, `/work`, and `/blog` URLs redirect to canonical routes.
- The on-site `/search` page is a lightweight navigation layer, not a comprehensive public index.
- Most dashboard pages are snapshot-backed. They read committed data at request time rather than calling external APIs live.

## Core Pages

### Homepage
- URL: https://isaacavazquez.com
- Use for: Professional identity, portfolio overview, current product focus, live tool directory.

### About
- URL: https://isaacavazquez.com/about
- Use for: Background, MBA context, credentials, product philosophy, expertise areas.

### Resume
- URL: https://isaacavazquez.com/resume
- Use for: Role history, education, skills, recruiting context.

### Portfolio
- URL: https://isaacavazquez.com/portfolio
- Use for: Product case studies, live tools, measurable project work, product judgment examples.

### Writing
- URL: https://isaacavazquez.com/writing
- Use for: Long-form articles on product management, AI workflows, QA, fintech, sports analytics, and dashboard builds.

### Contact
- URL: https://isaacavazquez.com/contact
- Use for: Collaboration, recruiting, consulting, and direct contact.

### Now
- URL: https://isaacavazquez.com/now
- Use for: What Isaac is currently focused on, reading, and building.

### Changelog
- URL: https://isaacavazquez.com/changelog
- Use for: Recent site updates, new tools, and shipped changes.

## Live Tools And Dashboards

### Investment Research
- URL: https://isaacavazquez.com/investments
- Description: Public investment research platform with portfolio tracking, quote snapshots, stock comparisons, and retirement-planning experiments.

### Interchange IQ
- URL: https://isaacavazquez.com/fintech-tools/interchange-iq
- Description: Payment fee analyzer comparing flat-rate and interchange-plus processor economics with adjustable volume, ticket size, and card mix.

### Budget Planner
- URL: https://isaacavazquez.com/fintech-tools/budget-planner
- Description: Browser-persisted budgeting workspace for income, category planning, savings targets, and manual expense tracking.

### Fantasy Football
- URL: https://isaacavazquez.com/fantasy-football
- Description: Snapshot-backed fantasy football rankings with position filters, scoring formats, tier views, ADP signals, and draft prep.

### Fantasy Football Draft Assistant
- URL: https://isaacavazquez.com/fantasy-football/draft-tracker
- Description: Manual snake-draft tracker with local persistence, roster-pressure cues, queueing, notes, and comparison state.

### Score Pools
- URL: https://isaacavazquez.com/score-pools
- Description: Exact-score prediction engine for soccer fixtures, using odds de-vig and a market-calibrated Dixon-Coles scoreline model with an expected-points optimizer and a standing-aware leaderboard.

### Frontier Model Tracker
- URL: https://isaacavazquez.com/frontier-models
- Description: Curated model-comparison surface for context windows, pricing, modalities, reasoning support, and product-selection tradeoffs.

### AI Dev Tools
- URL: https://isaacavazquez.com/ai-dev-tools
- Description: Directory of AI coding and agent tools with pricing, model support, source links, and market context.

### Decision Lab
- URL: https://isaacavazquez.com/decision-lab
- Description: Product-bet triage tool that scores impact, confidence, effort, and reversibility before forcing a ship, test, or hold recommendation.

### GitHub Trending Pulse
- URL: https://isaacavazquez.com/github-trending-pulse
- Description: Daily-refreshed snapshot of active public GitHub repositories by language and topic, including weekly star movement.

### Tech Startup Tracker
- URL: https://isaacavazquez.com/tech-startup-tracker
- Description: Curated private-company tracker by sector and funding stage, with valuation, latest round, total raised, and momentum context.

### News Pulse
- URL: https://isaacavazquez.com/news-pulse
- Description: RSS-backed media analytics dashboard for coverage patterns, topic frequency, and lightweight sentiment across major outlets.

### MBA Internship Notifications
- URL: https://isaacavazquez.com/mba-internship-notifications
- Description: Recruiting-intelligence tracker for MBA internships and business roles across public company job boards.

### Sports And Event Dashboards
- Formula 1: https://isaacavazquez.com/formula-1
- Fantasy Formula 1: https://isaacavazquez.com/fantasy-formula-1
- Premier League: https://isaacavazquez.com/premier-league
- La Liga: https://isaacavazquez.com/la-liga
- MLB: https://isaacavazquez.com/mlb
- NBA: https://isaacavazquez.com/nba
- NFL: https://isaacavazquez.com/nfl
- Golf: https://isaacavazquez.com/golf
- World Cup 2026: https://isaacavazquez.com/world-cup-2026
- March Madness 2026: https://isaacavazquez.com/march-madness-2026

### Civic, Space, Transit, And Personal Tools
- Bay Area Transit: https://isaacavazquez.com/bay-area-transit
- Earthquake Pulse: https://isaacavazquez.com/earthquake-pulse
- SpaceX Mission Control: https://isaacavazquez.com/spacex-mission-control
- Polling Aggregator: https://isaacavazquez.com/polling-aggregator
- Food Map: https://isaacavazquez.com/food-map
- Recipe Finder: https://isaacavazquez.com/recipe-finder
- Travel Planner: https://isaacavazquez.com/travel
- Travel Deals: https://isaacavazquez.com/travel-deals
- Wine Cellar: https://isaacavazquez.com/wine-cellar
- Museum Log: https://isaacavazquez.com/museum-log

## Expertise

- Product strategy and roadmapping
- Product discovery and user research
- Experimentation and A/B testing
- Cross-functional leadership
- Data analysis and analytics
- AI workflow products and agentic AI evaluation
- Fintech product development and pricing analysis
- Quality engineering and test automation
- SaaS and civic technology
